---
name: Research Free Routing Stack
description: Research free options for data, geocoding, routing, and optimization for OpenSmartRouting.
---

Research the free stack options for this project.

Compare:

- road data sources
- geocoding options
- routing engines
- optimization libraries
- Python integration
- licensing
- Spain suitability
- update freshness
- local versus hosted execution

Prefer evidence and tradeoffs over quick recommendations.
